docs: update docs to reflect routing and verbose mode changes

- Remove /v1/responses and wildcard /v1/* from Shape of the app

- Note 400 model_not_found error for unmatched models in POST /v1/chat/completions

unreleased_commits.author: Copilot
unreleased_commits.message:
Add verbose logging, dynamic recent rows, and success-only recent tracking

- metrics.go: Only append to recent list for successful requests (2xx-3xx, no error)
- proxy.go: Add Verbose/LogOutput to Options and Proxy; log each request to stderr when verbose; add maskToken helper
- ui.go: Make recentRows dynamic (only actual rows, no empty padding); update resolveMode to accept *config.Config and force plain mode when verbose
- main.go: Pass Verbose and LogOutput to proxy.New

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: JaredHatfield <208119+JaredHatfield@users.noreply.github.com>

unreleased_commits.author: Copilot
unreleased_commits.message:
Restrict proxy to only /v1/chat/completions and always serve /v1/models from config

- ServeHTTP now only forwards POST /v1/chat/completions; all other paths return 404
- GET /v1/models always returns configured models (empty list if none configured)
- Added modelIsConfigured helper and validates model against config before forwarding
- Returns HTTP 400 with OpenAI-style JSON error when model is not in configured list
- writeModels initializes Data as empty slice to avoid null in JSON response
- Removed shouldRewriteModel check for /v1/responses (only chat completions proxied)
- Removed dead code fallthrough for /v1/models upstream forwarding
- Added TestModelsEmpty, TestChatCompletionsModelNotFound, TestNonChatEndpointRejected
- Updated TestStreamingFlushesAndAggregatesUsage to include google/gemini in config

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: JaredHatfield <208119+JaredHatfield@users.noreply.github.com>
